query:
-- Tabla principal de códigos de descuento
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS discount_codes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  discount_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  expires_at DATETIME NULL,
  status ENUM('active','inactive','expired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  max_uses INT NULL,
  current_uses INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  observations TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Tabla de trazabilidad de usos
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS discount_code_uses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  discount_code_id INT NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  discount_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  original_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  final_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  channel ENUM('tpv','online','crm','delegated') NOT NULL,
  reservation_id INT NULL,
  tpv_sale_id INT NULL,
  applied_by_user_id VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  applied_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (discount_code_id) REFERENCES discount_codes(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
);

-- Añadir campos de descuento a tpv_sales
ALTER TABLE tpv_sales
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_code VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS original_total DECIMAL(10,2) NULL;

-- Añadir campos de descuento a reservations
ALTER TABLE reservations
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_code VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS original_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL;

-- Añadir campos de descuento a transactions
ALTER TABLE transactions
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_code VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS original_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL;

-- Índices para búsquedas frecuentes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_discount_codes_code ON discount_codes(code);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_discount_codes_status ON discount_codes(status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_discount_code_uses_code ON discount_code_uses(discount_code_id);
